title: Add 3-way tie detection and sprite regeneration

log.context: Add 3-way tie detection and sprite regeneration

All done. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Changes made:**

1. `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts` — two additions:
   - Added `notifySpriteTie(pollId)` function (lines ~1416–1447): sends two inject POSTs to Discord — a human-readable alert (`"🎨 Three-way tie on sprite-X! Votes reset..."`) and the machine trigger (`[sprite-regen] sprite-X` from `vote-system`). Uses the same `fetch`-based pattern as `notifyVoteWinner`.
   - Added tie-check block inside the POST `/api/vote` handler after the win...(truncated)
